data.title: Dime Community Bancshares reports a 103% YoY increase in Earnings Per Share. Net income: $25.8M for Q3 2025, versus $11.5M in Q3 2024. Total deposits increased to $12.06 billion in Q3 2025. Loan portfolio balances at $10.72 billion in Q3 2025. Non-interest income was $12.2 million in Q3 2025. Total non-interest expense was $62.2 million in Q3 2025. Quarterly net interest income was $103.4 million in Q3 2025. Non-performing loans were $72.1 million at the end of Q3 2025. Earnings call scheduled on October 23, 2025. Stockholders' equity increased to $1.45 billion in Q3 2025. [Character count: 565]
data.description: Dime Community Bancshares, Inc. reported quarterly net income of $25.8 million, with adjusted EPS of $0.61 per share for September 30, 2025. Total deposits increased by $644.3 million year-over-year, with core deposits up by $971.9 million. Business loans saw significant growth, increasing by $160.5 million on a linked quarter basis and $409.1 million year-over-year. The net interest margin surpassed 3% in the third quarter. Non-interest income was $12.2 million, and total non-interest expense was $62.2 million. Income tax expense was $12.4 million with an effective tax rate of 31.0%. Non-performing loans were $72.1 million, compared to $53.2 million in the previous quarter. Stockholders' equity increased to $1.45 billion. Book value per common share was $30.44, and tangible common book value per share was $26.81. The company's regulatory capital ratios exceeded requirements, and dividends per common share remained at $0.25. The third quarter earnings call is scheduled for October 23, 2025.

data.title: Raymour & Flanigan partners with Bread Financial on new financing program for customers, offering flexible payment options and increased buying power.
data.description: A new private label credit program is set to provide customers with enhanced purchasing abilities and flexible payment choices. This initiative aims to boost customers' buying power and ensure a smoother shopping experience. With this program, customers can benefit from convenient payment options and have increased flexibility when making purchases.

data.title: Pharvaris to share clinical data at ACAAI 2025 highlighting oral B2 receptor antagonists for HAE and AAE-C1INH. 8 abstracts accepted.
data.description: Pharvaris, a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol PHVS, headquartered in Zug, Switzerland, is in the late stages of developing innovative oral bradykinin B2 receptor antagonists for individuals affected by bradykinin-mediated illnesses like hereditary angioedema (HAE) and acquired angioedema due to C1 inhibitor deficiency (AAE-C1INH). Today, Pharvaris disclosed the approval of two abstracts for verbal presentation and six for poster presentation at the 2025 Annual Scientific Meeting of the American College of Allergy, Asthma, and Immunology (ACAAI) set to take place from November 6-10 in Orlando, Florida.

data.title: JCET Group reports record Q3 revenue of RMB 10.06 billion, profit before tax up 29.3% YoY.  #financialresults #JCETGroup
data.description: On October 23, 2025, JCET Group, a prominent global provider of IC back-end manufacturing and technology services, announced its financial performance for the third quarter of 2025. The company disclosed a notable Q3 revenue figure of RMB 10.06 billion, marking a record high for this period.

data.title: An entity acquires $32M in ETH as BTC, Solana whales sell off. Ethereum interest seen, with market preference shifting.
data.description: Analysts have indicated that the recent purchase of a large amount of Ethereum by a whale investor is a sign of growing interest from institutional players. Meanwhile, a significant shift in the market preference was noted as a Solana whale offloaded a staggering $93 million worth of the cryptocurrency.

data.title: EU imposes sanctions on Russian A7A5 stablecoin and cryptocurrency exchanges amid growing concerns over oil companies utilizing digital assets to evade financial restrictions.
data.description: According to the European Commission, Russian oil companies have been utilizing digital assets and crypto platforms more frequently to evade financial sanctions.

data.title: US national debt surpasses $38T amid shutdown, fastest pace since pandemic. Debt grew at twice the pace outside of COVID-19. Reached $37T in Aug 2025 after $34T in Jan 2024, $35T in Jul 2024, and $36T in Nov 2024. Michael Peterson warns of increasing debt speed.
data.description: During the current federal government shutdown, the U.S. gross national debt has surged past $38 trillion, according to recent Treasury data. This figure has raised concerns about the country's financial stability, making it the fastest trillion-dollar increase in debt outside of the COVID-19 pandemic. The national debt had previously reached $37 trillion in August 2025, after hitting milestones of $34 trillion in January 2024, $35 trillion in July 2024, and $36 trillion in November 2024. Michael Peterson, chair and CEO of the Peter G. Peterson Foundation, emphasized the alarming pace at which debt is accumulating, stating that the current rate is twice as fast as the growth rate seen since 2000. This concerning trend is further elaborated by Galaxy CEO Mike Novogratz. For more detailed insights, refer to Benzinga.com for the full story.

data.title: W&T Offshore to release Q3 2025 earnings; conference call scheduled; symbol: WTI.
data.description: Houston-based company W&T Offshore, Inc. (NYSE: WTI) has disclosed the schedule for the release of its third quarter 2025 financial results and conference call. The announcement was made on October 23, 2025.

data.title: Tradr launches 9 new leveraged ETFs for industry leaders, offering 200% long exposure.
data.description: Today, Tradr ETFs introduced nine new single stock leveraged ETFs designed for sophisticated investors and professional traders. The funds aim to offer 200% long exposure to a range of industry leaders. Out of the nine ETFs launched, seven provide this exposure on specific stocks.

data.title: TechnipFMC reports Q3 2025 results: Revenue $2.6B, up 4.4% from previous quarter and 12.7% year-over-year, with net income of $309.7M.
data.description: TechnipFMC plc (NYSE: FTI) released its third-quarter 2025 financial results with revenue reaching $2.65 billion, up 4.4% from the previous quarter and 12.7% year-over-year. Net income for the period was $309.7 million, showing growth from the previous quarter. The company provided a detailed breakdown of its financial performance, including a reconciliation of U.S. GAAP to non-GAAP measures in their financial schedules.

data.title: Ketjen and Axens extend collaboration with Eurecat on catalyst tech, Ketjen sells 50% stake in Eurecat to Axens.
data.description: In Houston and Rueil-Malmaison, France, Ketjen Corporation and Axens SA have disclosed modifications to their ownership of and partnership with Eurecat. As per the new agreements, Ketjen is set to expand its collaboration with Eurecat related to cutting-edge catalyst technologies and services like regeneration, rejuvenation, ex-situ sulfiding, and processing of spent catalysts. Moreover, Ketjen has agreed to transfer its 50 percent ownership interest in Eurecat SA to Axens, along with Ketjen's Isomerizati.

data.title: Lindsay Corp. (NYSE: LNN) reports Q4 results for FY 2025 with international irrigation revenues up 23%, North America impacted by lower demand.
data.description: Lindsay Corporation (NYSE: LNN), a prominent global manufacturer and distributor of irrigation and infrastructure equipment and technology, released its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending on August 31, 2025. In the fourth quarter, international irrigation revenues surged by 23%, primarily driven by growth in regions such as South America, MENA, and Australia. However, North America irrigation revenues were reduced due to a decrease in replacement demand post lower storm damages.
